channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: ClearFake — 10 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with clearfake .

item.title: 30,000 WordPress Sites Affected by Authentication Bypass Vulnerability in Tutor LMS Pro WordPress Plugin
How do we Navigate Asia-Pacific’s Climate-Cyber Polycrisis? - ipsnews.net
Iran War vs. Israel & U.S. Cyber Reflections - SOCRadar® Cyber Intelligence Inc.
Cyber operations escalated by Iran following US, Israel attacks - SC Media
Escalation in the Middle East: Tracking “Operation Epic Fury” Across Military and Cyber Domains - Flashpoint.io

UPDATE: 🇨🇳 #China suspected in SECOND @FBI surveillance net breach in 3 years. There is a pattern. Early days of what we know, and experience with the last breach suggests it will get worse. 1/ By @dnvolz - x.com
item.description: China is suspected of conducting a second major breach of FBI surveillance infrastructure within three years, indicating a persistent pattern of nation-state cyber espionage targeting U.S. intelligence capabilities. The breach affects critical surveillance networks and represents a significant escalation in cyber operations against U.S. federal agencies. Based on the previous incident, analysts expect the scope and impact of this breach to be substantial and potentially worse than initially disclosed.

item.title: Cyberattaques : « avec l’intelligence artificielle, les pirates automatisent et démultiplient leurs attaques » - Sud Ouest
item.description: This article discusses how artificial intelligence is enabling cybercriminals to automate and scale their attack operations. The report highlights the evolving threat landscape where AI tools are being leveraged by attackers to increase the frequency and sophistication of cyberattacks. This represents a significant shift in the threat environment as adversaries gain capabilities to conduct more widespread and efficient campaigns.

item.title: Cyberattaque contre la ville de Paris : la capitale annonce avoir subi une fuite de données - 01net.com
item.description: The city of Paris has announced that it suffered a cyberattack resulting in a data breach. The incident exposed sensitive data, though specific details about the scope and nature of the compromised information were not immediately disclosed. This represents a significant security incident affecting a major European capital's municipal infrastructure and systems.

item.title: News alert: DDoS attacks surge 75% in 2025; Link11 says attacks now sustained, not sporadic - Security Boulevard
item.description: According to Link11, distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attacks have increased by 75% in 2025, representing a significant escalation in cyber threats. The report indicates a shift in attack patterns, with adversaries now conducting sustained, continuous attacks rather than sporadic incidents. This trend suggests attackers are becoming more persistent and sophisticated in their targeting strategies, posing increased risks to organizations across various sectors.

item.title: Malware Brief: When the supply chain becomes the attack surface - Barracuda Networks
NYDFS warns financial sector of heightened cyber threats amid global conflict - JD Supra
Network Six launched a new Managed Cybersecurity Service - The Manila Times
Cybersecurity M&A Roundup: 42 Deals Announced in February 2026 - SecurityWeek
AI-Based Cybersecurity Monitoring - Security Boulevard
If you subscribed to Success, check this: 141,000 subscribers' data is on the internet - Cybernews
Alexes Hazen MD Data Breach Lawsuit Investigation - Claim Depot
Attackers are using your network against you, according to Cloudflare - CyberScoop
item.description: Cloudflare has released threat intelligence indicating that attackers are exploiting compromised networks to launch attacks against other targets. This report highlights how adversaries leverage hijacked infrastructure and network resources as part of their attack campaigns. The findings underscore the importance of network security monitoring and incident response to prevent networks from being weaponized against other organizations.

item.title: Kaspersky: No signs Coruna iPhone exploit kit made by US - theregister.com
item.description: Kaspersky has released analysis indicating that the Coruna iPhone exploit kit, used for targeting iOS devices, does not appear to have been developed by US-based threat actors. This threat intelligence assessment provides attribution analysis of a known mobile exploitation tool, helping the security community understand the origins and potential operators of the malware kit used in attacks against Apple devices.

item.title: K&C planning systems back online after major cyber attack - Hounslow Herald
Community College of Beaver County victim of cyberattack - Audacy
Russia forged new cyber weapons to attack Ukraine. Now they're going international - The Kyiv Independent
